title: MajorZwey's Blue Hearts
description: This project adds blue hearts instead of the red ones and some visibility/PvP improvements.
body:
[![Discord Server Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/325a89553e2cccaaac1327a84a2b339a0c1d7ff6.webp)](https://discord.gg/MY8YtmtC3M)     [![Youtube Channel Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca2512fe8cab08fdafee0d8f64757a0b29d57c7.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@MajorZwey)

# Overview
This resource pack adds blue hearts and some visibility/PvP improvements.
# Features
Blue Hearts,
Improved visibility on poison hearts and
Improved visibility on wither hearts.
# What about hardcore?
Don't worry, because same features apply to hardcore hearts!
# Why use it for PvP?
Especially in DeBuff PvP where you have many poison potions this resource pack becomes very handy!
# My other packs
[MajorZwey's Better Obsidian](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/majorzweys-better-obsidian)

[MajorZwey's Better Bow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/majorzweys-better-bow)
